lede: A look at February 10 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Justin Gatlin and Vince Gilligan, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: South Korea
events.desc: South Korea decides to stop the operation of the Kaesong joint industrial complex with North Korea in response to the launch of Kwangmyŏngsŏng-4.

events.title: NATO
events.desc: France and Belgium break the NATO procedure of silent approval concerning the timing of protective measures for Turkey in case of a possible war with Iraq.

events.title: Cold War
events.desc: Cold War: Captured American U2 spy-plane pilot Gary Powers is exchanged for captured Soviet spy Rudolf Abel.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Attempting to completely lift the Siege of Leningrad, the Soviet Red Army engages German troops and Spanish volunteers in the Battle of Krasny Bor.

events.title: Spanish Civil War
events.desc: Spanish Civil War: The Nationalists conclude their conquest of Catalonia and seal the border with France.

events.title: Second Italo-Ethiopian War
events.desc: Second Italo-Abyssinian War: Italian troops launch the Battle of Amba Aradam against Ethiopian defenders.

events.title: Việt Nam Quốc Dân Đảng
events.desc: The Việt Nam Quốc Dân Đảng launches the failed Yên Bái mutiny in hope of overthrowing French protectorate over Vietnam.

events.title: Denmark
events.desc: About 75% of the population in Zone I votes to join Denmark in the 1920 Schleswig plebiscites.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: A Union naval flotilla destroys the bulk of the Confederate Mosquito Fleet in the Battle of Elizabeth City on the Pasquotank River in North Carolina.

events.title: Vasco da Gama
events.desc: Vasco da Gama sets sail from Lisbon, Portugal, on his second voyage to India.

births.name: Boris Pasternak
births.line: Russian poet, novelist, and literary translator Nobel Prize laureate

deaths.text: Wilhelm Röntgen, German physicist and academic, Nobel Prize laureate
Ernesto Teodoro Moneta, Italian soldier and journalist, Nobel Prize laureate
William IX, Duke of Aquitaine, Duke of Aquitaine and Gascony and Count of Poitou

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Eusebia Palomino Yenes
Christian feast day: José Sánchez del Río
Fenkil Day(commemoration of the Second Battle of Massawa) (Eritrea)
